summary: Implemented a localhost-only devmasterd kernel with bearer token auth, local intake/authorization/provider/evidence APIs, provider adapter fixture execution, smoke state artifact, and unauthorized request tests.
recommendation_for_human: Proceed to Gate I devmasterd review. Do not treat this as authorization for Web Console, IDE extension, real provider calls, subscription CLI daemonization, external repo mutation, deploy, PR creation, or production side effects.
notes: Smoke path used localhost only and a test token not stored in committed state.
